description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical lotion container with a metallic-looking screw-on cap. The body is predominantly a light teal color, decorated with whimsical text, playful questions, and a prominent pink band encircling the upper section. The word 'AriZona' is displayed vertically in large, bold letters, and the surface features a pattern of white geometric shapes and bubble-like dots. The container also includes a nutrition facts panel and other small print, suggesting a design inspired by beverage cans. The overall appearance is modern and eye-catching, with a glossy finish that reflects light.
description: A tall, teal cylindrical lotion container with playful text, pink bands, and bold 'AriZona' branding, finished with a metallic screw-on cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing whimsical text, a pink band, and the start of the 'AriZona' logo.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white geometric shapes and continuation of the pink band.
description_view_2: Rear view with the full 'AriZona' logo, nutrition facts, and more of the teal bubble pattern.
description_view_3: Side view with the 'AriZona' logo in large letters and additional text details.
